collection.name: Seminars_(pp_cmj_all)
collection.prototype: Select id, created_date, updated_date, Module, self_1, self_2, self_3, s.nameSem_st, s.veduschiy_st, s.participants_st, s.place_st, s.dataivremya_st, s.materials_st from ( select rkkbase.id, rkkbase.created_date, rkkbase.updated_date, rkkbase.module as module, rkkbase.subject as subject, '<id>' as self_1, ':' as self_2, '</>' as self_3, ( select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'nameSem') as nameSem_st, ( select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'veduschiy') as veduschiy_st, ( select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'participants') as participants_st, ( select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'place') as place_st, ( select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'dataivremya') as dataivremya_st, ( select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'materials') as materials_st from F_DP_Intrkk internalrkk join f_dp_rkk rkk on rkk.id = internalrkk.id join f_dp_rkkbase rkkbase on rkkbase.id = rkk.id where rkkbase.isdeleted <> 1) s where 1=1
collection.counting-prototype: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( select rkkbase.id, rkkbase.created_date, rkkbase.updated_date, rkkbase.module AS Module, '<id>' AS self_1, ':' AS self_2, '</>' AS self_3 FROM F_DP_Intrkk internalrkk JOIN f_dp_rkk rkk ON rkk.id = internalrkk.id JOIN f_dp_rkkbase rkkbase ON rkkbase.id = rkk.id JOIN F_DP_Intrkk_Executor executor ON executor.owner = internalrkk.id JOIN so_beard beard ON beard.id = executor.executor WHERE rkkbase.isdeleted <> 1 AND rkk.regnumcnt IS NULL ) s WHERE 1=1 ::where-clause

filter.name: created_date
filter.criteria: cast(created_date as date) = cast({0} as date)
